description_long: This is a modern, slim laptop with a silver metallic body and a black keyboard. The screen is open and displays a colorful desktop wallpaper featuring cartoon characters, with numerous desktop icons visible. The keyboard is a standard QWERTY layout with a large trackpad centered below it. The exterior lid is plain silver with a prominent, glossy apple-shaped logo in the center. The sides of the laptop show multiple ports, including USB and audio jacks, and the overall design is sleek and minimalist. The laptop appears lightweight and portable, suitable for use in urban environments such as cafes, offices, or public spaces.
description: A sleek, silver laptop with a black keyboard and a colorful screen, featuring a prominent apple-shaped logo on the lid and multiple side ports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with a colorful wallpaper, black keyboard, and large trackpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the slim profile and visible keyboard keys.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain silver lid with a glossy apple-shaped logo in the center.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slim profile, keyboard, and several visible ports.
attribute_brand_logo: A glossy, white apple-shaped logo is centered on the exterior lid.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a desktop wallpaper with cartoon characters and desktop icons.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row and no numeric keypad, standard for compact laptops.
